toggles.label: 回答直後に解説を表示 / Show explanation immediately
toggles.behavior: When enabled, show the .explain block for questions that have been answered.

toggles.label: すべての回答を表示 / Show all answers
toggles.behavior: When enabled, show explanations for all questions and render/update the results table (answers + score) in the results panel.

resultsPanel.buttonBehavior: Clicking the button turns on 'Show all answers' and renders the results panel.

events.answerChange: Recomputes live score; updates reveal state; refreshes results panel if 'Show all answers' is enabled.
